name: AI SQL query generator from natural language
description: Takes a natural language question and a database schema description, uses Claude AI to generate the correct SQL query, explains the query logic, and posts both the SQL and explanation to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Generate SQL queries from schema only - AI-powered

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting generated SQL

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the SQL query result

question.description: Natural language question to convert to SQL (e.g. 'Show me all customers who placed orders in the last 30 days')

schemaDescription.description: Database schema description (table names, columns, relationships). Can be CREATE TABLE statements or plain text description.

databaseType.description: Database type: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, SQL Server, Oracle

additionalContext.description: Additional context about naming conventions, business rules, or data specifics

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for SQL generation
Run Claude AI to generate SQL
Build Slack Block Kit message with SQL and explanation
